calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Dec-31-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant SIDHU Transportation LLC.

Dept. 505; Judge Cindee Mayfield; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:23 am and concluding at 9:31 am

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau Inc. is represented by Soheila Somrani, Esq.
Defendant SIDHU Transportation LLC. not appearing.
Proof of service on file.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau Inc., and against Defendant SIDHU Transportation LLC..

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau Inc., is awarded judgment against Defendant SIDHU Transportation LLC. as follows:

Damages/Principal: $37,179.81
Pre-Judgment Interest $9,293.31
Costs: $526.14
Attorney Fees: $2,825.00
Total Judgment: $49,824.26

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court. (D505)

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Dec-10-2025 Continued To Dec-31-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Nov-18-2025 Continued To Nov-19-25 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 306

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Nov-19-2025 Continued To Dec-19-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 506 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Sidhu Transport LLC et al.
Dept: 306. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: C. Balanga. Proceedings recorded by "For The Record" commencing at 10:09 a.m.

The Court indicates all documents were not received.

The court orders a file stamp courtesy copy of the complaint and the motion and all required documents to be reviewed.

The Court continues the matter and sends it back to department 505 for December 19, 2025 at 9:00am

Proceedings concluded at 10:59a.m.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Oct-22-2025 Continued To Nov-19-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
